hero.title:
Argentine Leather. 
Quality That Travels the World.
hero.subtitle: Second-generation family business specialized in the export of bovine, caprine, and buffalo hides to international markets.

about_us.title:
One family. 
Three Decades of Hides.
about_us.content: Rauch Leathers S.A. is led by Rubén De Fabio and Marcos De Fabio, who oversee every stage of the operation, from sourcing and processing to international trade.

tag2.title: Quality
tag2.content: Rigorous Quality Control at Every Stage.

mission: Founded in Rauch, Buenos Aires, we have been building strong relationships across the local market for more than 30 years.

products.title: Raw Materials for the Global Leather Industry.

product1.title: Bovine Hides
product1.description: Our main production line. Hides from heifers, young steers, cows, and steers — salted or dried — sourced from selected slaughterhouses in Buenos Aires. 100% traceable origin, mechanical flaying, and preparation in accordance with export standards.

tecnica.title: Bovine Hides
tecnica.subtitle: SPECIFICATIONS BY CATEGORY
tecnica.footer: Each pallet contains between 90 and 110 hides, uncategorized.

product2.title: Buffalo Hides
product2.description: Buffalo hides sourced from northern Argentina, available upon specific request. Highly regarded in Asian and European markets for their durability and grain characteristics. Sourced from controlled facilities, with mechanical flaying and preparation in salted condition.

tecnica.title: Buffalo Hides
tecnica.subtitle: SPECIFICATIONS BY CATEGORY
tecnica.footer: Each pallet contains between 80 and 110 hides depending on category.

product3.title: Custom-order Hides
product3.description: We work with different grades and preparations to meet each client's requirements. We offer 1st, 2nd, and mixed grades, with salted or dried preservation, and custom preparations tailored to the buyer's needs.

product4.title: Collagen and Gelatin
product4.description: Selected bovine hides for the collagen and food-grade gelatin industry. These hides may present slight variations in preservation or cuts, acceptable for industrial processing.

sx-qualification: Certified by Official SENASA Registration N° 5146, guaranteeing safe, traceable salting processes adapted to global standards.

step1.title: Procurement
step1.description: We source fresh hides directly from selected slaughterhouses with which we have long-standing relationships, ensuring quality from the point of origin.

step2.title:
Owner-Supervised 
Salting
step2.description: The salting process is carried out at our facility or at the source, always under the direct supervision of the company owners.

step3.title:
Grading by 
Type and Weight
step3.description: Hides are separated and classified by category (heifer, cow, steer) and weight range, ensuring uniform and consistent batches.

step4.title: Trimming and Preparation
step4.description: Trimming and preparation are performed according to the specific requirements of each client's industry.

step5.title:
Palletizing and 
Export Loading
step5.description: Efficient palletizing and container loading, with all export documentation and SENASA certification in order.

export.title: Exporting Argentine hides to international markets since 2019.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: If you are looking for a reliable supplier of Argentine hides, we are here to help.
